definitions.text: Physical frame. The physical structure of a human or animal seen as one single organism. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: I saw them walking from a distance, their bodies strangely angular in the dawn light.
The body is driven by desires, but the soul is at peace.

definitions.text: To give body or shape to something.
To construct the bodywork of a car.
